## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and the problem it solves.

## Trust and compatibility

- [ ] No trust boundary, evidence schema, permission mode, or public CLI behavior changes.
- [ ] Relevant trust/compatibility changes are documented below and covered by regression tests.

## Verification

- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] Documentation and changelog updated when behavior changed.

Do not attach private repositories, credentials, or unredacted evidence artifacts.
